Participant Upload Agreement Content:
PARTICIPANT AGREEMENT & FULL LIABILITY WAIVER

Video Contest Show (Owned and Operated by Football Talents Show)

By clicking “I Agree”, submitting any video, or using the Video Contest Show platform, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and fully agreed to all terms below, and that this Agreement is legally binding.

1. ELIGIBILITY – STRICT AGE REQUIREMENT
Participation is strictly limited to individuals 18 years of age or older. Minors are strictly prohibited from participating under any circumstances. Any false declaration of age will result in immediate disqualification, and the participant shall bear full legal responsibility. Football Talents Show bears no responsibility for any violation of this clause.

2. FULL RESPONSIBILITY FOR VIDEO RECORDING
The participant confirms that all submitted videos are recorded voluntarily, independently, and without any physical supervision, instruction, or control by Video Contest Show or Football Talents Show. The participant bears full and exclusive responsibility for the recording location, personal safety, and any injury, accident, damage, or legal violation arising from recording or submission. Video Contest Show and Football Talents Show shall not be liable for any incident related to the creation, recording, or submission of the content.

3. OWNERSHIP & INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY – EXCLUSIVE TRANSFER
The participant irrevocably agrees that all intellectual property, commercial, media, and usage rights related to any submitted content, including but not limited to videos, images, audio recordings, performance, name, likeness, and voice, are transferred fully, exclusively, permanently, and without limitation to Football Talents Show immediately upon submission. Football Talents Show has the unrestricted right to use, edit, modify, publish, distribute, reproduce, delete, or combine the content with other materials, for commercial, promotional, marketing, or media purposes, worldwide, without time limitation and without compensation. The participant waives any current or future claims related to ownership, moral rights, or financial compensation.

4. COPYRIGHT, CONTENT REVIEW & REJECTION
The participant guarantees that the submitted content does not infringe any copyright, trademark, privacy, or intellectual property rights of any third party. Football Talents Show and Video Contest Show reserve the absolute right to review, reject, remove, or delete any content at their sole discretion, without explanation or obligation. The participant assumes full legal and financial liability for any copyright or third-party claims and fully indemnifies Football Talents Show.

5. FULL WAIVER & INDEMNIFICATION
The participant fully releases, indemnifies, and holds harmless Video Contest Show, Football Talents Show, their owners, partners, affiliates, and employees from any claims, damages, losses, liabilities, costs, or legal actions arising from participation, recording, submission, or use of the content. This waiver shall remain effective even after content removal, disqualification, or termination of participation.

6. CONDUCT & REPUTATION
Any attempt to defame, harm, misrepresent, or damage the reputation of Video Contest Show or Football Talents Show may result in immediate termination and legal action.

7. FINAL & NON-APPEALABLE DECISIONS
All decisions made by Video Contest Show and/or Football Talents Show are final, binding, and non-appealable.

8. GOVERNING LAW & JURISDICTION
This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted in accordance with the laws of the United States of America, to the extent not in conflict with mandatory local laws. Football Talents Show reserves the exclusive right to select the competent court for any dispute arising out of or related to this Agreement, including courts of the United States of America, Kingdom of Bahrain, Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan, Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, and the French Republic. The participant expressly waives any objection to jurisdiction, venue, or forum non conveniens.

9. ELECTRONIC CONSENT & LEGAL ACKNOWLEDGMENT
By clicking “I Agree”, the participant confirms and legally acknowledges that they are at least 18 years old, assume full responsibility for recording and submitting the content, permanently transfer all rights to Football Talents Show, and agree to all terms without reservation or limitation.

Sponsor Agreement Content:
SPONSORSHIP AGREEMENT

Video Contest Show (Owned and Operated by Football Talents Show)

By clicking “I Agree”, the Sponsor confirms that this Sponsorship Agreement is read, understood, and accepted, and that it constitutes a legally binding electronic agreement.

1. DEFINITIONS
Program: Video Contest Show. Organizer: Football Talents Show. Sponsor: Any individual or legal entity providing financial or in-kind sponsorship.

2. PURPOSE OF SPONSORSHIP
This Agreement governs the sponsorship relationship whereby the Sponsor provides support to the Program in exchange for promotional exposure solely determined by the Organizer.

3. SPONSORSHIP CONTRIBUTION
All sponsorship contributions are non-refundable. The Sponsor acknowledges that no specific commercial, marketing, or audience results are guaranteed.

4. BRAND EXPOSURE
The Organizer retains full discretion over the form, placement, duration, and frequency of any sponsor branding. The Sponsor shall have no right to object or request modifications.

5. INDEPENDENCE & CONTROL
The Sponsor shall have no control over the Program’s content, participants, judging process, or results. Football Talents Show retains full and exclusive editorial and operational control.

6. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
Each party retains ownership of its respective trademarks and branding. The Sponsor grants Football Talents Show a non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use the Sponsor’s name and logo solely for promotional purposes related to the Program.

7. NO PARTNERSHIP OR AGENCY
Nothing in this Agreement shall be deemed to create any partnership, joint venture, agency, or employment relationship between the Parties.

8. LIABILITY & INDEMNIFICATION
The Sponsor agrees to fully indemnify and hold harmless Football Talents Show from any claims, damages, losses, or liabilities arising from the Sponsor’s materials, branding, or actions.

9. TERMINATION
Football Talents Show reserves the right to terminate this Agreement immediately for reputational, legal, or operational reasons without compensation or liability.

10. GOVERNING LAW & JURISDICTION
This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the United States of America. Football Talents Show reserves the exclusive right to select the competent court for any dispute, including courts of the United States of America, Kingdom of Bahrain, Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan, Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, or the French Republic.

11. ELECTRONIC CONSENT
By clicking “I Agree”, the Sponsor confirms full acceptance of this Agreement and waives any right to challenge its validity or enforceability.

Privacy Policy Content: Click Kick collects account information such as name, email address, phone number, role, profile details, contest submissions, voting actions, reports, payment records, and activity logs needed to operate the platform. Uploaded videos, sponsor materials, moderation actions, and reports may be reviewed by authorized staff for safety, compliance, dispute handling, and service quality. We use Firebase and related service providers for authentication, storage, database, analytics, notifications, and secure infrastructure. We do not sell personal data. Information is retained as long as required for account operation, legal compliance, fraud prevention, audit history, and contest records. By using the app, you consent to this processing. If you need account assistance, data correction, or deletion review, contact platform support through the administrator contact provided by the service.
Terms & Conditions Content: By using Click Kick, you agree to follow platform rules, contest requirements, moderation decisions, payment terms, and applicable law. Users must provide accurate account information and may not impersonate others, misuse the platform, manipulate votes, upload illegal or infringing content, or interfere with platform operations. Contest submissions must follow the assigned topic, format, deadlines, and moderation standards. The platform may suspend accounts, remove content, reject entries, or restrict access when policy violations, fraud, or abuse are detected. Payments, sponsorship fees, invoice records, and contest outcomes are governed by the specific contest workflow and administrator decisions. Final moderation, eligibility, and enforcement decisions remain with the platform administrators.
Contest Rules Content: All contest entries must follow the contest topic, sponsor brief, upload format, time limit, moderation rules, and submission deadlines shown inside the app. Users may only submit original or properly licensed content and must not upload copied, illegal, misleading, offensive, or vote-manipulated material. The platform may reject, remove, or disqualify submissions that violate contest requirements, community standards, copyright rules, or platform integrity policies. Voting results, eligibility, rankings, rewards, and final winner decisions are managed by Click Kick according to the published contest flow and moderation process.
Apple Contest Disclaimer: Apple is not a sponsor of, responsible for, or involved in any contest, sweepstakes, prize draw, or reward offered through this app.
Community Guidelines Content: Keep content lawful, respectful, and relevant to the contest topic. Do not upload violent, hateful, sexually explicit, misleading, infringing, spam, or dangerous material. Do not post copyrighted music, stolen branding, fake identities, manipulated engagement, or content that violates sponsor instructions or contest rules. Do not harass users or attempt vote buying, fake voting, or coordinated abuse. Report suspicious content through the in-app reporting tools. Repeated or severe violations can lead to content removal, contest disqualification, blocked access, or permanent account action.
No harassment, hate speech, or bullying.
